AGENT_BOTS.DESCRIPTION: Agent AI agents are like the most fabulous members of your team. They can handle the small stuff, so you can focus on the stuff that matters. Give them a try. You can manage your AI agents from this page or create new ones using the 'Add AI agent' button.

AVATAR.ERROR_DELETE: Error deleting AI agent avatar, please try again

BOT_CONFIGURATION.TITLE: Select an AI agent
BOT_CONFIGURATION.DESC: Assign an AI agent to your inbox. They can handle initial conversations and transfer them to a live agent when necessary.
BOT_CONFIGURATION.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Successfully updated the agent AI agent.
BOT_CONFIGURATION.DISCONNECTED_SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Successfully disconnected the agent AI agent.
BOT_CONFIGURATION.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not update the agent AI agent. Please try again.
BOT_CONFIGURATION.DISCONNECTED_ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not disconnect the agent AI agent. Please try again.

API.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not add AI agent. Please try again later.

LIST.404: No AI agents found. You can create a AI agent by clicking the 'Add AI agent' button.

CONFIRM.TITLE: Confirm Deletion
CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?

API.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not delete AI agent. Please try again.
Could not update AI agent. Please try again.

ACCESS_TOKEN.TITLE: Access Token
ACCESS_TOKEN.DESCRIPTION: Copy the access token and save it securely
ACCESS_TOKEN.RESET_ERROR: Unable to regenerate access token. Please try again

DESCRIPTION.LABEL: Description
DESCRIPTION.PLACEHOLDER: What does this AI agent do?

ERRORS.NAME: AI agent name is required
ERRORS.VALID_URL: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://

WEBHOOK.DESCRIPTION: Configure a webhook AI agent to integrate with your custom services. The AI agent will receive and process events from conversations and can respond to them.
